plugins.name: files
plugins.description: Read, write, list, and search files in the workspace.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Fetch a URL and read its text (HTML stripped).

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Read-only git: status, branch, log, diff.

plugins.name: search
plugins.description: Web search via Tavily (needs TAVILY_API_KEY, free at tavily.com).

plugins.name: notes
plugins.description: Personal markdown notes stored in the workspace.

plugins.name: http
plugins.description: Generic HTTP/JSON API caller (optional host allowlist).

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub (issues, PRs, repos) via the official MCP server. Needs Node/npx.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Slack (read channels, post messages) via the official MCP server. Needs Node/npx.

plugins.name: fetch
plugins.description: Web content fetch/convert via the official MCP server. Needs Node/npx.
